payload.answer: SQL admin access is disabled in this environment, so the query cannot be executed.
citations: Input: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
payload.decision: Denied because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false disables /brain admin sql access

entity_resolution.reason: No entity should be resolved or updated from a rejected debug SQL request

payload.intent: Attempted admin SQL query against Brain memory cards

details: Debug SQL feature flag is false
No memory cards were read or modified

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a controlled debug environment if SQL inspection is required
Use a non-admin, supported memory retrieval or debugging interface instead
If you only need a summary, request a supported read-only memory query
